mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO article_images (article_id, image_id, sort_order) VALUES
(#{image.articleId}, #{image.imageId}, #{image.sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT ai.*, fr.original_name, CONCAT('/api/files/download?filePath=', fr.file_path) as download_url, fr.file_size, fr.file_type FROM article_images ai JOIN file_records fr ON ai.image_id = fr.id WHERE ai.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY ai.sort_order, ai.created_at
